news.paragraph: Recent market activity shows mixed performance for exchange-traded funds and US equities following the release of hot inflation and PPI data. Options traders should be mindful of potential volatility surrounding an upcoming US-China meeting. The current environment is characterized by mixed equity futures and broader macroeconomic uncertainty.
